# Claude Code Documentation

> Claude Code is an agentic coding tool from Anthropic.

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/getting-started): How to install and set up Claude Code
- [Configuration](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/configuration): Configure Claude Code settings and preferences
- [CLI Usage](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/cli-usage): Command-line interface reference
- [MCP Servers](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp-servers): Set up Model Context Protocol servers
- [Hooks](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks): Custom automation hooks for Claude Code
